description_long: This object is a sleek, modern wireless computer mouse with an ergonomic, angular design. Its body is primarily black with a glossy blue accent running along the top and sides, giving it a high-tech appearance. The left and right mouse buttons are subtly integrated into the top shell, and a scroll wheel is visible between them. The left side features textured grip patterns and additional buttons, likely for thumb access, while the right side is smooth with subtle geometric detailing. The rear of the mouse displays a stylized logo reading 'Ice Claw' with a claw mark graphic, adding a distinctive branding element. The overall construction suggests a durable plastic shell with internal electronic components and a likely battery compartment.
description: A modern, angular wireless computer mouse with black and blue accents, ergonomic grip, and a distinctive 'Ice Claw' logo on the back.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue accent, textured grip, and side buttons on the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the 'Ice Claw' logo and claw mark graphic.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with smooth black and blue surfaces and subtle geometric patterns.
description_view_3: Top view displaying the main buttons, scroll wheel, and the overall angular shape.
